template_library_04_v1.design_notes: Primary template is useful for slide intent and placeholder geometry, but most curated slides are visually sparse. Prefer custom layout builders or heavy overlay curation.

template_library_01_v1.design_notes: Strong white/navy sales-system language with thin rules, light cards, icons, and clean footer rhythm.

template_library_02_v1.design_notes: Best reference for chart, proof, and data-storytelling pages. Navy plus orange accent gives clearer hierarchy than the primary template.

template_library_03_v1.design_notes: Best reference for screenshot-led project cases, result bullets, pill tags, and portfolio-style narrative pages.

template_library_04_v1.cover_brand_right.design_notes: Usable as a simple corporate cover base, but needs stronger visual treatment or preserved hero assets.

template_library_04_v1.toc_visual_tiles_.design_notes: Conceptually useful TOC structure, but current slide still behaves like placeholder-heavy template material.

template_library_04_v1.summary_two_panel.design_notes: Useful for meeting summary structure; visual polish should be supplied by builder-generated cards and footer.

template_library_04_v1.issue_2x2_v1.design_notes: 2x2 issue structure is reusable, but dense business content needs custom text sizing and card treatment.

template_library_01_v1.channel_cover_v1.design_notes: Clean, high-contrast cover with strong blue field and centered title. Good model for branded opening slides.

template_library_01_v1.service_intro_car.design_notes: Good reference for compact service cards and icon-led grouping.

template_library_02_v1.problem_story_v1.design_notes: Good reference for evidence-led problem framing with chart plus narrative bullets.

template_library_02_v1.finance_closing_v.design_notes: Strong closing page with CTA, proof image, and clear contact/action hierarchy.

template_library_03_v1.project_case_v1.design_notes: Good screenshot-plus-outcome slide for internal proof or case-study reporting.

template_library_03_v1.portfolio_closing.design_notes: Balanced closing layout with large title and contact modules.
